name: Hardened Carrot Armor
description: Notes Part of the Fresh Carrot Paladin Set.
effects: On Ability Use: Release a nova of shots. Shots: 12 (arc gap: 30) Damage: 200-400 (300) Projectile Speed: 1 tiles/second Lifetime: 3 seconds Range: 4 Amplitude: 4 tiles Effects: Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles Cooldown: 4.8 seconds
